name: HaltDecision
description: PonderNet-style halt probability. Uses WitnessHead confidence with Gumbel-softmax sampling for differentiable halting.
code:
_hd{{_id}}_x = np.concatenate([{{latent}}.reshape(-1), {{step_embed}}.reshape(-1)], axis=0).reshape(1, -1)
_hd{{_id}}_d = _hd{{_id}}_x.shape[-1]
_hd{{_id}}_mean = np.mean(_hd{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_hd{{_id}}_var = np.var(_hd{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_hd{{_id}}_normed = (_hd{{_id}}_x - _hd{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_hd{{_id}}_var + {{eps}})
_hd{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn(1, _hd{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_hd{{_id}}_pre = np.dot(_hd{{_id}}_normed, _hd{{_id}}_W.T)
{{halt_prob}} = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_hd{{_id}}_pre))
_hd{{_id}}_g = -np.log(-np.log(np.clip(np.random.rand(1, 2), 1e-20, 1.0)))
_hd{{_id}}_logits = np.concatenate([np.log({{halt_prob}} + 1e-20), np.log(1 - {{halt_prob}} + 1e-20)], axis=-1)
_hd{{_id}}_soft = np.exp((_hd{{_id}}_logits + _hd{{_id}}_g) / {{temperature}})
{{halt_sample}} = (_hd{{_id}}_soft[:, 0:1] / (_hd{{_id}}_soft.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True) + 1e-20)).astype(np.float32)
